svg.title: PJ4 — File integration platform
svg.desc: External partner SFTP uploads land KMS-encrypted in the S3 landing bucket; S3 Event triggers Lambda post-processing into the active bucket with DLQ safety net; all access via private VPC Endpoints (S3 + KMS); separate log streams for SFTP audit and Lambda, monitored via Metric Filter → Alarm → SNS.
svg.text: PJ4 — File integration via Transfer Family + Lambda
SFTP → Landing bucket (KMS) → S3 Event → Lambda → Active bucket · DLQ on retry failure · Private access via VPC Endpoints (S3 + KMS) · Logs → Metric Filter → Alarm → SNS
